summary: Tested Coupon System - Backend APIs (21/21 passed), Admin CouponsTab UI (CRUD working), and Cart Coupon Input. All coupon types (percentage, fixed, free_delivery) and conditions (min_order, new_customers_only, scope) validated successfully.

issues: Console warning about <span> child inside <select>/<option> - hydration issue (React SSR related)

critical_code_review_comments: Added data-testid attributes for coupon input (data-testid='coupon-input') and apply button (data-testid='coupon-apply-btn') in FoodCartPage.js
Added data-testid='create-coupon-btn' to CouponsTab.js create button
seed_data_creation: Existing seed coupons used: WELCOME20 (20% new customers), SAVE10 (10%), FREESHIP (free delivery)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon system fully tested. Backend APIs: create/list/update/delete/validate all working. Frontend: Admin CouponsTab shows 4 coupons (UITEST25 created during testing, FREESHIP, SAVE10, WELCOME20). Cart coupon input at FoodCartPage.js lines 503-566 with validation API integration. Note: Cart uses localStorage so session-based testing may lose cart items on page refresh.

admin_coupon_crud.details: Create percentage/fixed/free_delivery coupons, update, delete, toggle active status all working

coupon_validation_api.details: API validates coupon code, checks min_order, scope (food/shop/all), new_customers_only, calculates discount with max_discount cap

cart_coupon_input.details: Coupon section visible in cart with input field, apply button, error display, and applied coupon display with remove option

coupon_types.details: percentage (with max_discount), fixed amount, and free_delivery all validated via API tests

coupon_conditions.details: min_order_amount, new_customers_only, scope (food/shop/all) all enforced correctly by validation API
